hero.headline: Global Digital Goods,
hero.subheadline: CrossMor is your Merchant of Record for seamless AI subscriptions and digital goods. We handle payments, taxes, and compliance — you enjoy instant delivery.

categories.exploreRange: Explore our wide range of digital goods across AI tools and entertainment

categories.subtitle_gift_cards_wallet: Digital gift cards and prepaid options
categories.subtitle_regional_services: Local OTT, streaming vouchers, and wallet top-ups

footer.tagline: Your trusted Merchant of Record for digital goods. We handle payments, taxes, and compliance so you can focus on what matters.

store.title: Store
store.subtitle: Browse categories, compare regional options, and place demo orders. This storefront is designed to help partners verify our MOR operating model.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Quick answers for partners and customers. For live support, go to Contact.
help.receiptsDesc: Receipts issued by CrossMor as MOR.
help.supportDesc: Track orders and contact us anytime.
help.faq1a: Most items are delivered instantly after order confirmation. Some high-risk regions or large orders may require manual review.
help.faq2a: CrossMor is the seller on record for these digital products. We accept payment, handle compliance screening and support, and issue receipts.
help.faq3a: Refund eligibility depends on the product type and whether a code was delivered/redeemed. See Refund Policy for details.
help.faq4q: My payment failed — what should I do?
help.faq4a: Try another payment method or contact support with your order ID. We can help diagnose bank/issuer declines vs. risk screening.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_p1: Crossp Technology Limited and Superbo Information & Technology Limited (collectively, "CrossMor," "we," "us," or "our") provide merchant of record (MOR), payment processing, settlement, and related technology services through our website, APIs, and associated systems.
terms.s1_p2: Depending on the applicable commercial agreement, CrossMor may act as the legal seller of record for certain transactions, process payments on behalf of merchants, or provide technical routing and settlement services.
terms.s2_p1: You represent and warrant that your business is duly organized and legally authorized to operate, and that all products or services offered through our platform comply with applicable laws and regulations.
terms.s2_p2: You are responsible for product quality, delivery, intellectual property compliance, and customer support obligations unless otherwise specified in a separate agreement.
terms.s3_p1: You may not use our Services for unlawful, fraudulent, deceptive, sanctioned, or high-risk activities without prior written approval. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate services if prohibited conduct is detected.
terms.s4_p1: Service fees, settlement schedules, reserves, and processing costs are defined in your commercial agreement. We may deduct applicable fees, chargebacks, refunds, and penalties prior to payout.
terms.s5_p1: You agree to cooperate with fraud investigations, AML/KYC procedures, chargeback disputes, and regulatory inquiries. We may request documentation necessary to maintain compliance with financial regulations and card network rules.
terms.s6_p1: All platform technology, systems, trademarks, and proprietary tools remain the exclusive property of CrossMor. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to use the Services in accordance with these Terms.
terms.s7_p1: The Services are provided "as is" and "as available." To the maximum extent permitted by law, CrossMor shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Total aggregate liability shall not exceed the total fees paid in the three (3) months preceding the claim.
terms.s8_p1: We may suspend or terminate access to the Services if these Terms are breached, risk exposure becomes unacceptable, or regulatory requirements cannot be maintained.
terms.s9_p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.
terms.s10_p1: For questions regarding these Terms, please contact:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro1: Crossp Technology Limited and Superbo Information & Technology Limited ("Crossmor," "we," "us," or "our") are committed to protecting your privacy.
privacy.intro2: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information in connection with our Services.
privacy.s1_pci: We do not store full payment card numbers unless required under PCI DSS standards and contractual obligations.
privacy.s2_weUse: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.s3_basedOn: Where applicable, processing is based on:
privacy.s4_noSell: We do not sell personal data.
privacy.s5_weImplement: We implement administrative, technical, and physical safeguards including:
privacy.s5_noSystem: No system is 100% secure, but we take reasonable measures to protect data.
privacy.s6_li1: As long as necessary to provide Services
privacy.s6_li3: To resolve disputes and enforce agreements
privacy.s7_p1: Information may be transferred across jurisdictions where our service providers operate. We implement safeguards for international transfers where required.
privacy.s8_depending: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to:

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Questions about MOR setup, settlement, or supported regions? Reach us via email or Telegram.
contact.respondTime: We respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your product, target regions, and what you need (Payin / Payout / MOR)…
contact.toastSuccessDesc: We will get back to you shortly.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This is a demo policy page for partner review. Real production policy must be tailored by jurisdiction and SKU.
refund.digitalDifferentDesc: Many digital goods (keys, codes, top-ups) become non-refundable once delivered or redeemed. We still support refunds for duplicate charges, non-delivery, and clear product mismatches.
refund.eligible2: Code not delivered within the stated timeframe
refund.eligible3: Wrong region/product issued due to our error
refund.eligible4: Payment reversed by issuer (chargeback) — order will be cancelled
refund.notEligible2: Wrong purchase made by customer (e.g., wrong platform)
refund.notEligible3: Account restrictions on the platform side
refund.howToDesc: Contact support with your order ID, purchase email, and a screenshot (if relevant). We typically respond within 24 hours on business days.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Crossmor uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookie.s1_p: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.
cookie.s2_performance_p: Help analyze traffic and usage patterns.
cookie.s2_analytics_p: May include services such as Google Analytics.
cookie.s2_functionality_p: Remember preferences such as language and region.
cookie.s3_p: We may use trusted third-party analytics or infrastructure providers.
cookie.s4_p: You can manage cookies via your browser settings. Disabling cookies may limit certain functionality.
cookie.s5_p: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.subtitle: High-level compliance overview for partner review. Replace with your verified controls, policies, and entity details.
compliance.fraudScreeningDesc: Automated and manual reviews for unusual orders, high-risk regions, and velocity anomalies.
compliance.dataProtectionDesc: Least-privilege access, secure storage, and vendor controls for payment processing.
compliance.restrictedContentDesc: We block prohibited items and high-risk categories per payment processor rules.
compliance.dueDiligenceDesc: If you're evaluating CrossMor for a partnership, we can provide:
compliance.dueDiligenceLi3: Data processing terms and privacy policy

trackOrder.notFoundHint: If you just created a demo order, copy the ID from the confirmation toast or check "Recent demo orders" below.

sections.title: Language Priority
paragraphs: This document may be provided in multiple languages for convenience.
In the event of any inconsistency or conflict between the English version and any translated version, the English version shall prevail.

sections.title: Digital Goods Nature
paragraphs: All products sold on this platform are digital goods delivered electronically.
No physical goods are shipped unless explicitly stated.

sections.title: Merchant of Record Status
paragraphs: Crossmor acts as the Merchant of Record for transactions processed on this website.
Payment processing, refund handling, and regulatory compliance are managed in accordance with applicable laws.

sections.title: Third-Party Platforms
paragraphs: Some products grant access to third-party services or platforms.
We are not affiliated with third-party brands unless explicitly stated.
Use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and policies.

sections.title: Limitation of Regional Availability
paragraphs: Certain products or payment methods may not be available in all jurisdictions.
It is the customer's responsibility to ensure compliance with local laws before making a purchase.
